articles.title: We’re making a big change to the Copilot experience. Agent Mode is generally available and now the default across Copilot in Word, Excel and PowerPoint. As models become more capable, we’re bringing that power to where real work happens, right in the canvas. …Give an agent that canvas to reason over, and a single prompt can reshape the model, the bridge and the narrative at once. Read why….
